title: senecio moresbiensis
intro: Senecio moresbiensis, also known as Moresbi's ragwort, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to the island of La Réunion. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio moresbiensis include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve congestion and promote the removal of mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of infusions or teas, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although caution is advised due to the potential toxicity of its alkaloid content.
